supporting_quote: EZH2 mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human EZH2 primer probe set RTS1986 ... was used to measure mRNA levels. EZH2 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RiboGreen®.
notes: Ionis. In-vitro EZH2 assays (probe sets RTS1985/RTS1986) all normalized to total RNA via RiboGreen. No GAPDH/cyclophilin/ACTB anywhere.

supporting_quote: in cultured HepaRG™ cells ... measured by quantitative real-time PCR using human primer probe set RTS3454 and adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®.
notes: Ionis (PKK/KLKB1). In-vitro HepaRG assays (RTS3454) normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. Cyclophilin A appears only as boilerplate alternative and in one in-vivo mouse liver study (Table 51, normalized to housekeeping gene Cyclophilin); not the HepaRG dataset. 'actin' is only patent-classification text.

supporting_quote: Cultured HepG2 cells ... CFB mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human primer probe set RTS3459 was used to measure mRNA levels. CFB mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®.
notes: Ionis. In-vitro HepG2 assays (RTS3459) normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. Cyclophilin (housekeeping gene Cyclophilin/Cyclophilin A) appears only in in-vivo hCFB mouse liver studies (Tables 75 etc.), where results were dual-normalized to RIBOGREEN and Cyclophilin; not the HepG2 dataset.

supporting_quote: Cultured THP-1 cells ... IRF5 RNA levels were measured ... using the human IRF5 primer-probe set HTS4167. IRF5 RNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®.
notes: Ionis/Ohio State. SURPRISE: patent does contain GAPDH and ACTB/beta-actin, but ONLY for non-THP-1 contexts. GAPDH (probe RTS104, target probe RTS37490) is used in Example 10 for A-431 and SH-SY5Y cells; GAPDH+ACTB dual-normalization is used in the in-vivo KARPAS-229 xenograft (Table 55) and in-vivo transgenic mouse (mouse GAPDH). All THP-1 in-vitro assays (Examples 1 and 3) normalize to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. So for the THP-1 dataset the basis is total_RNA_ribogreen.

supporting_quote: Cultured Hep3B cells ... Factor VII mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human primer probe set RTS2927 ... was used to measure mRNA levels. Factor VII mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®.
notes: Ionis (Factor VII). In-vitro Hep3B assays (RTS2927) normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. GAPDH appears only in an in-vivo cynomolgus monkey liver study (Table 38, dual-normalized RTS2927/Ribogreen and RTS2927/GAPDH); cyclophilin A only in boilerplate methods alternative. Not the Hep3B dataset.
